name: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe
description: Floral and bright with notes of jasmine and citrus.

name: Colombian Supremo
description: Balanced and smooth with a nutty, chocolate finish.

name: Sumatra Mandheling
description: Earthy, full-bodied with low acidity and herbal notes.

name: Costa Rica Tarrazu
description: Crisp acidity with sweet honey and crisp apple notes.

name: Guatemala Antigua
description: Complex and spicy with a velvety cocoa texture.

name: Kenya AA
description: Bold, fruity flavors reminiscent of wine and berries.

name: Brazilian Santos
description: Soft, nutty, and low acidity, perfect for espresso.

name: Jamaica Blue Mountain
description: Mild, beautifully balanced with a lack of bitterness.

name: Hawaii Kona
description: Rich, smooth, and slightly sweet with a buttery finish.

name: Tanzania Peaberry
description: Bright acidity with notes of blackcurrant and chocolate.

name: Panama Geisha
description: Extraordinary floral aroma with tea-like delicacy.

name: Yemen Mocha
description: Wild, earthy, and complex with strong chocolate tones.

name: Peru Organic
description: Mellow and sweet with hints of vanilla and almond.

name: Vietnam Robusta
description: Strong, harsh, and highly caffeinated. Great for iced coffee.

name: Mexican Chiapas
description: Light body, brisk acidity, and a snappy, clean finish.
